title: Product Market Fit Diagnostics Input
description: Required and optional inputs for executing the Product Market Fit Diagnostics skill.

problem_statement.description: The business problem or diagnostic question to be analyzed.

company_context.description: Company background, industry, size, and relevant business context.

user_retention_cohort.description: User retention cohort data segmented by acquisition period (minimum 8 weeks of data)

results_sean_ellis.description: Results from a Sean Ellis survey or equivalent willingness-to-pay and disappointment measurement

net_promoter_score.description: Net Promoter Score data and verbatim qualitative feedback from users

product_engagement_metrics.description: Product engagement metrics: active usage frequency, session depth, and core feature adoption rates

organic_referral_word.description: Organic referral and word-of-mouth acquisition data to assess virality signals

churn_interview_transcripts.description: Churn interview transcripts to understand exit reasons from former users
